requirement: Security Management Process - implement policies and procedures to prevent detect contain and correct security violations
verification_method: Review constitution security policies and quality gate enforcement

requirement: Workforce Security - implement policies ensuring appropriate access to ePHI
verification_method: Review access control and authorization policies

requirement: Information Access Management - implement policies authorizing access to ePHI
verification_method: Review access management in security policy and architecture

requirement: Security Awareness and Training - implement security awareness and training program
verification_method: Review governance standards for training requirements

requirement: Security Incident Procedures - implement policies to address security incidents
Contingency Plan - establish policies for responding to emergencies
verification_method: Review disaster recovery and backup policies

requirement: Evaluation - perform periodic technical and nontechnical evaluation
Facility Access Controls - limit physical access to electronic information systems
Workstation Use - implement policies for proper workstation use
Access Control - implement technical policies limiting access to ePHI
Audit Controls - implement mechanisms to record and examine access to ePHI
verification_method: Review tracing and audit trail configuration

requirement: Integrity Controls - implement policies to protect ePHI from improper alteration
verification_method: Review data integrity controls and quality gates

requirement: Person or Entity Authentication - implement procedures to verify identity
Transmission Security - implement measures to guard against unauthorized access during transmission
